title: GANDALF: Gated Adaptive Network for Deep Automated Learning of Features
search_query: GANDALF: Gated Adaptive Network for Deep Automated Learning of Features
notes: We propose a novel high-performance, interpretable, and parameter \& computationally efficient deep learning architecture for tabular data, Gated Adaptive Network for Deep Automated Learning of Features (GANDALF). GANDALF relies on a new tabular processing unit with a gating ...
